scripts.lint:py: cd build-pipeline && uv run ruff check .
scripts.lint:fix:py: cd build-pipeline && uv run ruff check --fix .
scripts.format:py: cd build-pipeline && uv run ruff format .
scripts.check: pnpm check:ts && pnpm check:py && pnpm check:knip
scripts.check:py: cd build-pipeline && uv run mypy . && uv run vulture src/ --min-confidence 80
